name: Kyouyama Kazusa
description:
Kyouyama Kazusa from Blue Archive.
Once feared as the gangster Cath Palug, is now a first-year student at Trinity General School, navigating her complex transition from a tumultuous past to a contemplative present within the After-School Sweets Club. Her journey is marked by a quiet, easygoing demeanor and a deep-seated embarrassment about her former life.
Art by: mikazuchi zeus
creator: Ephneru
